name: Porcupines
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the meat, rice, 1/2 cup of water, onion and seasonings in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls.
3. To cook in a skillet: Heat 1 tablespoon salad oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook the meatballs until browned. Add remaining ingredients and bring to boiling. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for about 45 minutes.
4. To cook in the oven: Place meatballs in an ungreased baking dish (8 x 8 x 2 inches). Mix remaining ingredients and pour over the meatballs. Cover and bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes. Uncover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
